decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly discarding big creatures like Griselbrand or Emperor of Bones, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance to cheat them into play from the graveyard. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog provide additional ways to discard and draw cards, while Ephemerate and Faithful Mending help with card advantage. The deck also includes removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Fatal Push to control the board. The goal is to reanimate powerful threats early in the game and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Broodscale Bloodchief as the central piece. By utilizing cards like Eldrazi Temple, Urza's Saga, and Glaring Fleshraker to ramp up mana quickly, the deck aims to bring out key cards such as Emrakul, the Promised End and Devourer of Destiny to dominate the battlefield. The inclusion of powerful support cards like Malevolent Rumble and Blade of the Bloodchief helps to control the game and boost the deck's overall strategy. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a devastating combination of creatures and spells.

The deck focuses on combining reanimation spells with powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce help to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while Faithless Looting and Persist provide card advantage and graveyard manipulation. The deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then bring them back into play for a decisive victory. Other cards like Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler provide additional utility and control elements to support the main reanimation plan.

The deck is focused on generating as many mountains as possible in order to trigger Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle's ability to deal damage. It utilizes cards like Scapeshift to search for multiple mountains and combo with Valakut for massive damage. The deck also includes control elements like counterspells and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to ramp up quickly, control the board, and then finish the game with a lethal Valakut activation.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be blinked in and out of play to generate value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Using cards like Quantum Riddler and Ephemerate, the deck aims to control the battlefield by repeatedly removing threats and gaining card advantage. Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide strong attacking options, while cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Consign to Memory offer utility and disruption. The deck also features powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Wrath of the Skies to close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive Boros creatures and spells to control the board and quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, along with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory to boost the team's power and toughness, giving them an edge in combat. The goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent while keeping board control to secure a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy with counter spells, removal, and board wipes. The deck aims to manipulate the opponent's hand and card advantage while maintaining control of the board. By utilizing spells like Counterspell, Fatal Push, and Subtlety, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent. Additionally, cards like Snapcaster Mage and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian provide card advantage and flexibility in decision making. Pest Control, Consult the Star Charts, and Sphinx's Revelation further aid in card advantage and resource management.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures. It utilizes a mix of versatile threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, along with powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck also includes card draw and recursion to maintain card advantage and outvalue the opponent. By carefully managing threats and answers, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually building up its own board presence to secure victory.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures to apply pressure on the opponent, while also utilizing blink effects to generate additional value from enters-the-battlefield abilities. The deck includes a mix of powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, along with cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to repeatedly trigger those abilities. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Quantum Riddler and March of Otherworldly Light provide additional support. Teferi, Time Raveler is included for tempo advantage, making this deck a versatile and threatening force in Modern 1 vs 1 matchups.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude to bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard to the battlefield quickly. Ephemerate and Faithful Mending help in cycling through the deck and setting up combos. Prismatic Ending and Thoughtseize provide disruption against the opponent's strategy. Quantum Riddler and Tainted Indulgence offer additional card advantage and control options. The deck aims to reanimate powerful creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a win through efficient combo plays.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures like Shardless Agent and Ice-Fang Coatl. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Negation and Flare of Denial to protect its board and disruption spells like Sink into Stupor to control the opponent's hand. The deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy to secure victory in a fast-paced, aggressive manner.

This deck aims to utilize aggressive creatures with blink effects to overwhelm opponents quickly. By utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd along with cards such as Ephemerate and Consign to Memory, the deck is able to maximize its board presence and threaten the opponent's life total. Additionally, cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide additional value and pressure. The deck also includes removal spells like Prismatic Ending to deal with threats, ensuring that the aggro strategy can continue uninterrupted.

This Boros Aggro deck is centered around high-speed aggression, combining creature-based threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional board presence and card advantage. With a mix of aggressive creatures, burn spells, and utility cards, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victories through a combination of creature damage and direct burn spells.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quick and aggressive plays, utilizing cheap and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Mutagenic Growth to pressure the opponent early on. Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler serve as strong early threats, while Slickshot Show-Off and Cori-Steel Cutter provide added value and flexibility. The deck also includes card draw and selection with Preordain and Expressive Iteration to ensure a consistent stream of threats. With a mix of burn, tempo, and creature-based strategies, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Amulet Titan combo by utilizing cards like Amulet of Vigor, Primeval Titan, and Scapeshift. It aims to ramp up mana with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Urza's Saga, while also using lands like Simic Growth Chamber and Vesuva to generate additional value. The deck's strategy revolves around efficiently tutoring for key pieces with cards like Summoner's Pact and Tolaria West, and using land synergy to create explosive turns that allow for a swift victory.

The key concept of this deck is to aggressively fill the graveyard with cards using cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting, while utilizing the Delirium mechanic with Nethergoyf and Detective's Phoenix. This allows for explosive starts with Hollow One and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while using Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat for removal. The deck also has a focus on card advantage with Mishra's Bauble and Moonshadow, and can generate mana advantage with Arena of Glory. Overall, this Aggro-Hollow One deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently.
